clubs.name: GEEEK Workshop
clubs.about: GEEEK is the campus hub for makers, tinkerers and embedded enthusiasts. We host weekly build sessions, hardware hackathons and industry mentor talks.

clubs.name: Octaves
clubs.tagline: The official music society of NIT Jalandhar.
clubs.about: Octaves brings together vocalists, instrumentalists and producers. We perform at every campus fest and host open-mic nights.

clubs.name: Aavishkar
clubs.about: Aavishkar runs CP contests, DSA bootcamps and open source sprints. Alumni at Google, Stripe and Atlassian.

clubs.name: Pragyan
clubs.about: Pragyan is the literary and debating society — MUNs, slam poetry and the campus magazine.

clubs.name: Robotics Club
clubs.tagline: From line followers to autonomous swarms.
clubs.about: Robotics Club competes in Robocon, e-Yantra and inter-NIT meets. State-of-the-art lab in CSE block.

clubs.name: E-Cell
clubs.about: Entrepreneurship Cell runs the pre-incubator, pitch nights and the annual Startup Pitch Fest.

events.name: Bhangra Workshop
events.about: Two-hour high-energy intro session led by senior performers. Open to all years.

events.name: METRA Exhibition
events.about: Annual maker exhibition showcasing student-built hardware projects across 30+ booths.

events.name: Hackathon 2026
events.about: 36-hour overnight hackathon. Tracks: AI, FinTech, Campus OS. ₹2L prize pool.

events.name: Startup Pitch Fest
events.about: Pitch your startup to a panel of VCs and alumni founders. Top 3 get pre-incubation.

events.name: Sports Analytics Summit
events.about: Talks from JioStar, Dream11 and ESPNcricinfo data teams. Includes a live data jam.

events.name: AI Bootcamp
events.about: 5-day bootcamp covering transformers, RAG and agentic workflows. Hands-on labs daily.

opportunities.title: Campus Ambassador
opportunities.about: Represent Unstop on campus, drive registrations and host info sessions.

opportunities.title: Marketing Intern
opportunities.about: Work with the brand team on campus activations and growth campaigns.

opportunities.title: Sports Research Analyst
opportunities.about: Build dashboards and insight decks for cricket, football and kabaddi properties.

opportunities.title: Event Volunteer
opportunities.about: Help run our annual TEDx event — logistics, hospitality and content.

opportunities.title: Startup Intern
opportunities.about: Engineering / Product internship across the payments and banking stack.

opportunities.title: Content Creator
opportunities.about: Create short-form tech content and tutorial threads for the campus audience.

notifications.title: Welcome to Xplore
notifications.body: Your campus activity feed, applications and event registrations now persist.

notifications.title: Account created
notifications.body: Your Xplore profile is ready. Start with a club, an event, or an opportunity.

notifications.title: Joined GEEEK Workshop
notifications.body: Your club membership has been saved to your profile.

notifications.title: Joined Pragyan
notifications.body: Your club membership has been saved to your profile.

messages.body: Welcome aboard. Try joining a club or registering for an event.
